---
title: Schedule
---

Talks will be 30 minutes long with a break of 10 minutes for discussion.


## 17 June

9:30 Opening

9:40

10:20

11:00 Coffee Break

11:30 

12:10

12:50 Lunch break

15:00

15:40

16:20

## 18 June

9:00 

9:40

10:20

11:00 Coffee Break

11:30 

12:10

12:50 Lunch break


15:00

15:40

16:20

## 19 June

9:00 

9:40

10:20

11:00 Coffee Break

11:30 

12:10

12:50 Lunch break
